description:
The world's most detailed globe

Google Earth Pro on desktop is available for users with advanced feature needs. Import and export GIS data, and go back in time with historical imagery. Available on PC, Mac, or Linux.
Here are highlights of the fixes, changes, and improvements we've made since the last major release of Google Earth Pro:
- Google Earth 10 KML compatibility improvements:
  - Support for gx:CascadingStyle KML extension; KML features imported from Google Earth 10 retain styles like icons, line widths, and colors.
  - Support for other extensions found in KML exported from Google Earth 10.
- Fix for app launch issue on some recent Linux releases.
- Measurement tool and property editor measurement tab use the same unit selection.
- GeoTIFF imports or super overlays can be saved as KMZs that can be opened in Google Earth 10.
- Other minor fixes and improvements.
